item.linktablet.tablet.tooltip.mount: Sneak + right-click a surface to mount
gui.linktablet.tablet.title: Link Tablet
gui.linktablet.reorder.title: Drag to rearrange
gui.linktablet.no_apps: No apps yet. Tap + to add one.
gui.linktablet.edit_app.name: App name
gui.linktablet.edit_app.no_frequencies: Pick one or two items, then hit Add.
gui.linktablet.edit_app.momentary.toolti: Transmits only while the button is held down. Click to change the app type.
gui.linktablet.edit_app.type.timed.toolt: Tapping transmits for a set time, then stops on its own. Tapping again restarts the clock. Click to change the app type.
gui.linktablet.edit_app.type.toggle.tool: Classic on/off switch. Click to change the app type.
gui.linktablet.edit_app.type.slider.tool: Analog output: the signal follows the slider, 0 (off) to 15. Click to change the app type.
message.linktablet.link_no_frequency: This link has no frequency set
linktablet.ponder.tablet.text_1: This Redstone Link receives on the frequency set by its two item slots
linktablet.ponder.tablet.text_2: The Link Tablet holds apps: named switches that transmit on those same frequencies
linktablet.ponder.tablet.text_3: Tapping an app on a mounted tablet's screen toggles every Link on its frequency
linktablet.ponder.tablet.text_4: Tip: right-click any Redstone Link while holding the tablet to add its frequency as an app
gui.linktablet.theme.title: Theme
